channel.title: LogicBuy — Buy by Specs, Not by Brands
channel.description: The global knowledge base for spec-driven, brand-free consumer decisions. Smart Decisions, Zero BS.

item.title: How to Choose a Mattress by Specs (Not Brands)
item.description: Stop falling for mattress marketing. Learn the 6 core specs that determine whether a mattress is worth your money — firmness, support layers, motion isolation, cooling tech, sleep trial, and warranty.
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)

item.title: Robot Vacuum Buying Guide: Specs That Actually Matter
item.description: Ignore the brand names and flashy ads. A robot vacuum is only as good as its suction power, navigation system, and dustbin capacity. Here are the 5 specs to always check before buying.
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)

item.title: How to Choose a Mattress by Specs (Not Brands)
item.description: Stop falling for mattress marketing. Learn the 6 core specs that determine whether a mattress is worth your money — firmness, support layers, motion isolation, cooling tech, sleep trial, and warranty.
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)

item.title: Robot Vacuum Buying Guide: Specs That Actually Matter
item.description: Ignore the brand names and flashy ads. A robot vacuum is only as good as its suction power, navigation system, and dustbin capacity. Here are the 5 specs to always check before buying.
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)

item.title: 床垫避坑指南：靠参数选床垫，而非品牌
item.description: 别被床垫营销洗脑。本文解析6个决定床垫是否值得购买的核心参数——软硬度、支撑层、隔振、散热、试睡期和保修。
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)

item.title: 扫地机器人购买指南：真正重要的参数
item.description: 忽略品牌名称和华而不实的广告。一款扫地机器人的好坏，完全取决于吸力、导航系统和尘盒容量。以下是购买前必须检查的5个参数。
item.author: hello@logicbuy.guide (LogicBuy Expert Team)
